items.sanitized_text: F3I is a review/background record for allene-centered catalytic asymmetric synthesis and natural product synthesis context. It is useful for broad review framing, not a single-method evidence source.
items.title: Allenes in Catalytic Asymmetric Synthesis and Natural Product Syntheses

items.sanitized_text: F47A is a representative method candidate for palladium-catalyzed asymmetric synthesis of axially chiral allenes and notes a dibenzalacetone-related title signal for high enantioselectivity. Mechanistic and optimization details still need manual PDF extraction.
items.title: Palladium-Catalyzed Asymmetric Synthesis of Axially Chiral Allenes
items.known_warnings: source conflicts require human review; not trusted for scientific quality

items.sanitized_text: P403 is a recent-progress method candidate for Pd-catalyzed asymmetric allenylation of secondary phosphine oxides with enyne-type propargylic carbamates. Exact substrate scope and outcomes need manual extraction.
items.title: Pd-Catalyzed Asymmetric Allenylation of Secondary Phosphine Oxides
items.known_warnings: missing fields: authors, doi; source conflicts require human review; not trusted for scientific quality
